Package com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.di

Class CachingModule

java.lang.Object
com.google.inject.AbstractModule
com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.di.CachingModule
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.google.inject.Module
public class CachingModule extends com.google.inject.AbstractModule
A derived injection module managing SDK caches
